title: Angular
description: A complete path through Angular — web and TypeScript foundations, components and templates, directives, services and dependency injection, routing, forms (including signal forms), HTTP, RxJS and Signals, state management, testing, Storybook, performance, SSR, PWAs, security, cross-platform (Capacitor, Ionic, Electron), deployment and enterprise-scale architecture. Beginner-to-expert roadmap updated for Angular v22 (June 2026): Signal Forms, Angular Aria, async reactivity, AI/MCP, template enhancements and migration guides.
